text: What's crackin' 3Fitters! Welcome to day 11. It is cardio day. So we'll be talking about what my cardio goals are, which I mentioned before.
I wanted to run 1.5 miles in 12 minutes, so that breaks down to an 8 minute mile. And I recently did a self-test and I'm pretty close.

So instead of running just straight on the treadmill or on the track or whatnot, I'm actually going to do some rowing machine because that's going to help support some of my other movements like the squat, the bench, and the deadlift.
So what I want to do is show you what the rowing machine looks like and then we'll talk a little bit more about it after.
Alright, so we're here on the Concept 2 Rower. I think this is one of the best cardio machines out there because it hits every muscle in your body.
The good thing about this machine is you can get both the quads to work as you push back.
You can also get the quads to work as you push back.
And the hamstrings as you pull yourself back in.
So quads are going to be used for the squats, hamstrings for the deadlift.
I'm going to get my row on.
So upper back is going to get engaged and that helps to support a lot of the bench press movements so that my shoulders stay supported.
So I'm going to tear this thing up. Probably go for about 5,000 meters.
All of this is going to support my overall cardio for the running too because I'm still working my legs.
So that's going to help to transfer over.
So thanks for watching and I will see you for dinner tomorrow.
